opinion.h: Lynell FRANKLIN et al., petitioners, v. Pleasant C. SHIELDS et al No. 77- 6016
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Motion of Public Defender of Wisconsin for leave to file a brief, as amicus curiae, granted. Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit denied.
Mr. Justice BRENNAN, Mr. Justice WHITE and Mr. Justice
